case_title: MILENS OF CALIFORNIA VS LACHICA CHRISTINA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILENS OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LACHICA CHRISTINA $2,040.80 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,086.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT LACHICA CHRISTINA HEARING SET FOR MAR-09-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF MAR-09-1992, GRANTED
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILENS OF CALIFORNIA
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILENS OF CALIFORNIA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LACHICA CHRISTINA
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,355.20 AS TO DEFENDANT LACHICA CHRISTINA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,040.80 FILED BY MILENS OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT LACHICA CHRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LACHICA CHRISTINA
POS ON CHRISTINA LACHICA SUB-SERVED NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HRG.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-27-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-15-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
